name: Chuck Wagon Pot Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle the chuck roast with pepper.
2. Dredge the roast in 1/4 cup of flour.
3. Brown the roast in hot bacon drippings in a large Dutch oven.
4. Place the sliced onion over the roast.
5. Add beef broth and coffee to the pot.
6. Cover and simmer for 1.5 hours or until the meat is tender.
7. Add carrots, potatoes, and 1 teaspoon of salt.
8. Cover and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
9. Remove the roast and vegetables from the pot.
10. Combine 2 cups water, 1/4 cup flour, and the reserved salt in a separate bowl.
11. Blend until smooth.
12. Stir into the liquid in the pot.
13. Cook, stirring constantly, until smooth and thick.
14. Serve over the meat and vegetables.
